synopsis.value: Ahn Ju-Hyeong (Lee Jong-Suk) works as a lawyer. He has the type of personality where he can be brutally honest to other people. He never had a deep interest or dream of becoming a lawyer to protect the weak or carry out justice. Ahn Ju-Hyeong became a lawyer simply because he likes following logic and cases. He has worked for the same law firm for the past 9 years, since he began his legal career and he is recognized at his law firm for his work by receiving a record salary for an associate lawyer. Ahn Ju-Hyeong has no interest in opening his own law office because it is too much trouble for him. He is comfortable in his perfect workplace, but his peaceful world begins to crack.

value.characterName: Seong Yu Deok [Chunggong law firm representative attorney]
Kim Ryu Jin [Hojeon law firm lawyer]
Na Gyeong Min [Kyungmin law firm representative attorney]
Kang Jeong Yun [Jo Hwa law firm representative attorney]
Yoo Dong Uk [Jo Hwa law firm former attorney] (Ep. 1)
Kim Myeong Ho [Hui Ji's adopted father] (Ep. 6)
